category_sources: Official GNU Make page describes GNU make as a tool controlling executable and non-source generation from source files.
display_name_sources: Official GNU manual page title is GNU Make Manual.
source_facts.homepage is GNU Make’s official GNU page.
docs_sources: Official GNU Make Manual page provides HTML, PDF, Info, text, and Texinfo manual formats.
repo_sources: GNU projects use Savannah Git; source_facts.source-archive is from GNU make release archive.
Official GNU Make page links to Savannah as the development source location.
tags_sources: Official GNU Make manual documents make and Makefile-driven builds.
